title: Thermal conductivities of some novel nonlinear optical materials
source_repository: Local verified fixture based on the cited publication
source_excerpt: The abstract reports AgGaS2 thermal conductivities of 0.014 W/(cm K) and 0.015 W/(cm K), respectively parallel and perpendicular to the optic axis.
parameter_names: AgGaS2 thermal conductivity parallel to optic axis
AgGaS2 thermal conductivity perpendicular to optic axis
